goal: Game — Office Simulation as Primary CEO Interface

risks: Graceful fallback rendering may look bad enough to scare off first-time users who don't realize they need the tileset
walls.png origin is still unknown — could be a license issue if it's from a paid pack
Git history rewrite (out of scope) must happen before repo goes public or the paid assets are still accessible in history
over_engineering_flags: Don't build an elaborate asset download/install system — a simple README + setup script is sufficient for v1

projects.title: Asset License Compliance — gitignore, fallbacks, setup, credits
projects.scope_summary: Remove non-redistributable assets from git tracking, add .gitignore rules, remove the non-commercial LimeZu free pack entirely, create a setup script that helps developers acquire and place the paid tileset, ensure the game renders graceful fallbacks when tileset PNGs are missing (colored rectangles / procedural furniture instead of crashes), investigate walls.png origin, and add proper attribution credits for LimeZu and JIK-A-4/MetroCity.
